text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's first three years of running in
the Twinkle Series have come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And she has already achieved many great things...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O! What race are you going to
run in next?! Are you looking for a rematch with
Maruzensky?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Is it true that you promised Yaeno and Ardan that
you'll run in a certain G1 race with them?! Do you
secretly have any other rivals?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my gosh... U-um... One question at a time,
please!

text_block_list.name: School Girl A
text_block_list.text: Chiyo! Look over here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
Aaahhh, you're sooo cute! You really are like the
sweetheart of the nation! Lemme hug you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: H-hug me?! The nation's what?! Uh... Th-thank you? I think?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks... Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O! Can you watch me the next time I
train and give me some tips, please?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
That's not fair! She'll watch me first! Right,
Chiyo?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yep, that's me! Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! Help!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's been treating me differently lately!
They're suddenly praising me like there's no
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that public interest in Sakura Chiyono O
has been skyrocketing lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The school even received a proposal to turn her story into a TV series titled The Tale of Sakura Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-this isn't a prank, is it? Or a dream?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What? Really? I still can't believe what's been
going on, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's been all about the Eternal Top Three
until recently. But now...
choice_data_list: Well, you did beat the Eternal Top Three.
Well, you did beat the Eternal Top Three.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But Maruzen's been stealing the show just as
much on the track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Shouldn't the magazine and TV reporters be
going to her instead?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer? I'm just going out on a limb here, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Could it be I'm actually pretty amazing?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You've stolen everyone's hearts, and
that's why they're all over you, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So how about a li'l scrimmage? Your trainer's
given you the A-OK already.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So how about a li'l scrimmage? Your trainer's
given you the A-OK already.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
R-really, Trainer?! Is it okay with you if I run with
Maruzen?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! Okay, let's do it, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to put the pedal to the metal! Now show
me just how strong you've gotten, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really, really strong! I won't be losing today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: My... Hehe! That's my line. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Go ahead and give us the signal! Ready,
set...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure you don't want to run with them as
well?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not now. I shall wait until it is time for the real
race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My desire to defeat them will only grow stronger
with time—and so will I.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It is the same for you, is it not, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It is... Hehe. We're rivals, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Sakura Chiyono O run with Maruzensky.
To her, this is the continuation of her dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I went back in time and told her past self this is
how things would turn out, I don't think she would
believe me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The first time I saw her run, I knew I wanted to be
like her—to someday stand as her equal.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how mediocre an Umamusume I am,
this is the one dream I never want to give up on...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Incredible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of Sakura Chiyono O's race, I hear
the voice of an Umamusume I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...I wanna run against her. If I run as earnestly as
her...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll start to find racing fun too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is now in a position to inspire
dreams in others.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Chiyo! Sorry, but can you sign more autographs
for me? People keep asking for them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What?! I just gave you a hundred the other day,
and they're gone already?! You're kidding!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm not! If that's too much work, then use your
handprint! Just slap your hand on a piece of
paper like your dad used to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Seriously? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...No, I'll sign them all properly. They asked for
my autograph and not my handprint, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And I don't want to let them down!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you, dear.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Chiyo? I've been thinking about how you
always say you're nothing but ordinary...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But I believe it's because you're so "ordinary" that
you've been able to become the star everyone
dreams of.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You started as a normal Umamusume, but you
still worked your way up to be a special, shining
star. So, Chiyo... Keep doing your best, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... Hehe, okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Despite being mediocre, I longed to be
extraordinary. I met people who supported me
and was able to make my special dream come
true.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (And I know who I have to thank for that.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"You can make dessert even with a ladle and
pot"...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's a good proverb. I need to write that
down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so Sakura Chiyono O's grand tale continues...
